summary: Created src/signals/rendering-signals.ts implementing WebGL rendering signal collection. Exports RenderingSignals interface (webglSupported, renderer, vendor, webglVersion) and collectRenderingSignals() function. Tries WebGL2 first with WebGL1 fallback, extracts renderer/vendor via WEBGL_debug_renderer_info extension, cleans up GPU resources via WEBGL_lose_context, and gracefully returns 'unavailable' fallbacks for all error conditions (missing DOM, SecurityError, blocked WebGL, empty strings). All 16 US-008 tests pass along with all other tests (111 total). Lint and typecheck clean.
